---
title: "Github Integration"
---

# Tools
-   [nycOpenData](https://github.com/martinezc1/nycOpenData)
-   [nysOpenData](https://github.com/martinezc1/nysOpenData)
-   [mtaOpenData](https://github.com/martinezc1/mtaOpenData)
-   [chiOpenData](https://github.com/martinezc1/chiOpenData)
-   [laOpenData](https://github.com/martinezc1/laOpenData)

# Teaching & OER
-   [Reproducible Research Using R](https://github.com/martinezc1/Reproducible-Research-Using-R)
-   [Teaching Reproducible Research Using R](https://github.com/martinezc1/teaching-reproducible-research-using-R)
-   [reproresearchR](https://github.com/martinezc1/reproresearchR)

# Projects
-   [NYC Open Data Student Gallery](https://github.com/martinezc1/NYC-Open-Data-Student-Gallery)
